LAW AND MOTION 302, WILIAM GWIRE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. MR. BLUMBERG STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD/CONCEALMENT AND CONVERSION. THE CLAIMS ARE NOT TIME BARRED. THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS COMPULSORY PER CCP 426.10(C) BECAUSE THE COMPLAINT AND CROSS-CLAIMS ARISE "OUT OF THE SAME TRANSACTION, OCCURRENCE, OR SERIES OF TRANSACTIONS OR OCCURRENCES." WHILE THE AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT INCLUDES EXTRANEOUS MATERIAL, MR. GWIRE CAN REASONABLY RESPOND. THE AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT EXPRESSLY ONLY HAS TWO CAUSES OF ACTION BROUGHT SOLELY BY MR. BLUMBERG AND DEMURRERS FOR UNCERTAINTY ARE DISFAVORED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Gwire, in pro per, Tel. 415.296.8880, for plaintiff/cross-defendant;
Jason Skaggs, of Skaggs Faucette LLP, Tel. 650.617.3226, for defendant/cross-complainant Elliot Blumberg.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: CROSS-DEFENDANT WILIAM GWIRE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is granted in part. Mr. Blumberg is given leave to file a Second Amended Cross-complaint that contains ultimate facts and removes reference to irrelevant third party lawsuits that Mr. Gwire has litigated. The remainder of the motion to strike is denied. Mr. Gwire fails to show that the pleading is a sham and the court notes that the notice of motion does not fully comply with CRC 3.1322. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Elliot Blumbergs Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Contempt And Or Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Gwire, in pro per, Tel. 415.296.8880, for plaintiff/cross-defendant;
Jason Skaggs, of Skaggs Faucette LLP, Tel. 650.617.3226, for defendant/cross-complainant Elliot Blumberg.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ELLIOT BLUMBERG's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Contempt And Or Sanctions is denied. The MOU is not a settlement that complies with CCP 664.6. The MOU expressly contemplates that the parties will enter into a subsequent "comprehensive" or "final" settlement. The court denies plaintiff's contempt request or request for an OSC regarding contempt. Mr. Blumberg fails to show that he complied with all of the conditions precedent to compel Mr. Gwire to remove thetruthaboutelliotblumberg.com website. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Gwire, in pro per, Tel. 415.296.8880, for plaintiff/cross-defendant;
Jason Skaggs, of Skaggs Faucette LLP, Tel. 650.617.3226, for defendant/cross-complainant Elliot Blumberg.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: CROSS-DEFENDANT WILIAM GWIRE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT is overruled. Mr. Blumberg states a cause of action for fraud/concealment and conversion. The claims are not time barred. The cross-complaint is compulsory per CCP 426.10(c) because the complaint and cross-claims arise "out of the same transaction, occurrence, or series of transactions or occurrences." While the amended cross-complaint includes extraneous material, Mr. Gwire can reasonably respond. The amended cross-complaint expressly only has two causes of action brought solely by Mr. Blumberg and demurrers for uncertainty are disfavored. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
